# Vendor

## DeckLinkSDK

**Blackmagic DeckLink SDK 15.3** (Mac). Used by the Capture module and DeckLink bridge.

- **include/** — C/C++ headers for the DeckLink API. The bridge target must add this as a header search path.
- **Samples/** — Official Mac samples (e.g. capture, device discovery). Reference only; not built by this project.

See project root **DECKLINK_SDK_SETUP.md** and **HDR_Analyzer_Pro_Master_Roadmap.md** §1.3 (Implementation Policy).
